# polaris_principal (Resource)

Manages a Polaris principal.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "polaris_principal" "example" {
  name = "alice"

  properties = {
    "team" = "data-engineering"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the principal. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `credential_rotation_required` (Boolean) If true, the initial credentials can only be used to call rotateCredentials. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `properties` (Map of String) Key-value metadata attached to the principal.

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID assigned to this principal by Polaris.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The OAuth client secret returned at creation time. Not available after import.
- `create_timestamp` (Number) Creation time as a Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds.
- `entity_version` (Number) Version of the principal object, used for optimistic concurrency control.
- `last_update_timestamp` (Number) Last update time as a Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds.
